message:
Add comprehensive unit tests for BasketSidebar component (27 tests)

Tests cover:
- Visibility states (open/closed, backdrop visibility)
- Empty basket state (empty message, no export actions)
- Populated basket state (items, counts, export buttons)
- Close interactions (close button, backdrop click)
- Remove item interaction (button existence and clickability)
- Clear basket interaction
- Copy install command button
- Download buttons (markdown, skills)
- Layout structure and accessibility

Uses real prompt IDs from registry, no mocks except URL object methods.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
